description: Tattoo artist ed hardy has taken the world by storm with his funky, urban brand - from rock stars to Hollywood legends, those who have a quirky taste in fashion love the tattoo inspired designs. Wear this watch to prove you're a style maverick not a trend follower. Case diameter: 25 mm Case thickness: 5 mm Dial shape: Rectangle Warranty: 2 years Stainless steel square case Broad black genuine leather strap and a tang clasp with a two-prong buckle ed hardy print and crystal embellishment on the straps Black dial with metallic hands and an print on the dial Screw to reset time Solid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durability
